## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor (internal, no behavior change)

## Testing

- [ ] `go build ./...` and `go vet ./...` pass
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes (including the loopback integration tests)
- [ ] Verified on Linux with libpcap (if this touches the pcap engine or transport)

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated docs and both READMEs (`README.md` / `README.fa.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or binaries committed
